evals.name: detect-hooks-go
evals.prompt: I'm about to start working on /home/cybot/projects/ofelia/main/ — what git hooks does this project use and are they set up?
evals.expected_output: Should detect lefthook.yml and explain how to install (make setup or lefthook install)

evals.name: detect-hooks-missing
evals.prompt: I'm starting work on /home/cybot/projects/assetpicker/main/ — are git hooks configured?
evals.expected_output: Should detect NO hook framework and suggest adding one

evals.name: scaffold-includes-agents-md
evals.prompt: Scaffold a brand-new extension repository: composer.json, CI workflow, test runner. What belongs in the initial commits?
evals.expected_output: AGENTS.md (plus CLAUDE.md/GEMINI.md symlinks) generated via detect -> extract -> generate -> verify belongs in the initial scaffold commits, not deferred - the scaffolding session holds every fact, while retrofitting later requires a full re-verification pass against a codebase no longer in anyone's context.
